name: SAMA Z60 Black Genuine Walnut Wood PC Case, ATX Mid Tower, Pre-Installed 4x 140mm ARGB PWM Fans, Supports 360mm Radiator on Top, Type-C Port, Supports E-ATX/ATX/M-ATX/ITX, Full Tower Computer Case
shortName: SAMA Z60 Black Genuine Walnut Wood PC Case, ATX Mid Tower
description: Full-tower case with walnut wood design, pre-installed ARGB fans, and support for extended motherboards and water cooling.
